notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Nolan McLean picks off Jake McCarthy at 1st on throw to first baseman Mark Vientos.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brett Sullivan grounds into a double play, pitcher Nolan McLean to catcher Luis Torrens to first baseman Mark Vientos. Mickey Moniak out at home. Brett Sullivan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brett Sullivan grounds into a double play, pitcher Nolan McLean to catcher Luis Torrens to first baseman Mark Vientos. Mickey Moniak out at home. Brett Sullivan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston grounds into a double play, shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos. Edouard Julien scores. Mickey Moniak to 3rd. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Troy Johnston out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston grounds into a double play, shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos. Edouard Julien scores. Mickey Moniak to 3rd. TJ Rumfield out at 2nd. Troy Johnston out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield reaches on a fielder's choice. Edouard Julien to 3rd. Mickey Moniak to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Mark Vientos.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge grounds out, pitcher Jaden Hill to first baseman Troy Johnston.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Brenton Doyle.

notableEvents.label: MJ Melendez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: MJ Melendez strikes out on a foul tip.
